# FastFile

A tax preparation and e-filing platform built for PTIN-holding preparers at
small and mid-size tax-prep shops. FastFile integrates directly with the
IRS Modernized e-File (MeF) system, so individual and small-business returns
can be transmitted for e-file without a third-party clearinghouse.

Every submission collects Form 8879 e-signature authorization before
transmission, and preparer conduct follows Circular 230 practice standards
throughout the return workflow. Client data handling is aligned with IRS
Pub 4557 safeguards and the GLBA Safeguards Rule, and disclosure of return
information to any third party requires an explicit Section 7216
consent-to-disclose record.

## Installation

npm install
npm run dev
